summary.zh: 动画工作台,把角色与物件「动起来」的一站式生成台。内置六条生成管线:像素角色四方向行走、序列帧 spritesheet、载具动画、怪物精灵、Spine 骨骼绑定,以及经 Kling 的 AI 视频生成。它以 iframe 嵌入 Studio,中间视口实时预览生成结果,产出可直接被引擎消费的动画资产,常接在角色编辑器之后做动作。
summary.en: The animation workbench — a one-stop台 for making characters and objects move. It ships six generators: 4-direction pixel walk cycles, sprite-sheets, vehicle animation, monster sprites, Spine rig binding, and AI video via Kling. Embedded in Studio as an iframe with a live center-viewport preview, it outputs engine-ready animation assets and typically follows the character editor.

body.zh: 像素四方向 / spritesheet / 载具 / 怪物 / Spine / AI 视频(Kling)
body.en: Pixel 4-dir / sprite-sheet / vehicle / monster / Spine / AI video (Kling)

body.zh:
iframe 嵌入 Studio,中间视口实时预览
6 个 AI 工具(anim:generate-*)
body.en:
Embedded as an iframe with live center preview
6 AI tools (anim:generate-*)

body.zh: 面板管理启用 → 左侧打开「anim」面板开始创作
body.en: Enable in Admin → open the 'anim' panel on the left

notes.zh: 管线打磨与视频生成完善
